# orm-public-sign-out

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the signOut mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.signOut({ input: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run signOut

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.signOut({ input: '<value>' }).execute();
```
